svg.title: Roadmap for building a 2D tile-based game with wgpu
svg.desc: Shows completed foundation steps and upcoming phases: 2D camera, sprite/tilemap rendering, game logic, and web deployment

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me how to implement a 2D orthographic camera uniform in wgpu with Rust')
sendPrompt('Show me how to implement camera panning and zoom for a 2D wgpu game')
sendPrompt('Show me how to implement a texture atlas and sprite batching system in wgpu Rust')
g.text: Single draw call for many tiles

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me how to build a tilemap data structure and renderer for a 2D wgpu game in Rust')
sendPrompt('Show me how to update the wgsl shader for 2D sprites with atlas UV coordinates')
sendPrompt('How should I structure game state, a fixed timestep loop, and tile collision for a 2D Rust game?')
sendPrompt('How do I implement tile-based collision detection in a 2D Rust game?')
sendPrompt('How should I handle player entity movement and animation in a tile-based 2D Rust game?')
sendPrompt('How do I load a tilemap from a file like Tiled JSON in a Rust wgpu game that also runs on web?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle web-specific concerns like async asset loading and canvas resizing in a wgpu Rust game?')
sendPrompt('How do I add basic audio to a Rust wgpu game that runs on both native and web?')

svg.text: Click any box to dive into that step
